message:
feat(ffs-core,ffs-ondisk): add listxattr/getxattr to FsOps VFS trait (bd-3bu)

Add listxattr() and getxattr() to the FsOps trait with default no-op
implementations. Implement on both Ext4FsOps (in-memory image) and
OpenFs (device-based). Add standalone parse_ibody_xattrs() and
parse_xattr_block() functions in ffs-ondisk for use without
Ext4ImageReader. 6 new tests covering parsing and VFS defaults.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
